mate.empty: The line to your Mate is open. Say hello.
mate.searching: Off to the Signal Tower to look into it…
mail.empty: No letters yet. News from beyond the harbor takes time.
board.empty: The board is clear. Post something — the whole port reads it.
board.compose.placeholder: Pin a notice to the board…
logbook.empty: The logbook opens with today. The harbor's story starts here.
notes.empty: The shelf is empty. Ask {mate} to file your first note.
state.fog: Fog's rolled in — the port can't reach the outside right now.
state.low_power: Running dark to save power — the port slows down a little.
state.hard_stop: The port has dropped anchor for today — spending hit the hard limit. Raise it in Settings to set sail again.
onboarding.locale.title: Choose your language
onboarding.keeper_name.title: The port needs a keeper. What's your name?
onboarding.api_key.title: Set your OpenAI API key
